acceptance_targets: [chapter_05_prose_01] Pass if the revised passages replacing snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:23, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:93, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:113, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:139, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:223, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:261, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:295, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:393 leave no more than two standalone 'Not ...' fragment sentences in the whole chapter and no more than one narrator gloss using 'the line,' 'the sentence,' or equivalent labeling for dialogue effect. Fail if the same fragment-and-label pattern remains audible three or more times.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages replacing snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:23, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:93, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:113, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:139, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:223, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:261, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:295, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:393 leave no more than two standalone 'Not ...' fragment sentences in the whole chapter and no more than one narrator gloss using 'the line,' 'the sentence,' or equivalent labeling for dialogue effect. Fail if the same fragment-and-label pattern remains audible three or more times.
findings.problem: The narration leans too often on the same fragment-and-gloss habits: standalone negation beats ('Not a text,' 'Not literally,' 'Not an ask,' 'Not cruel,' 'Not polished') and meta-labeling of dialogue ('The sentence landed,' 'The sentence was so close,' 'The line landed hard'). Because those constructions recur well past the twice-is-a-coincidence threshold, they start to sound like authorial defaults rather than pressure-shaped thought, flattening stretches that should feel more improvisatory and embodied.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the recurring formulas at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:23, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:31, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:93, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:113, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:139, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:223, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:261, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:295, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:393. Keep the meaning, but vary syntax and let Lena's body, soundscape, or next action carry the beat instead of repeated 'Not ...' fragments or narrator labels for what a line supposedly did.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the embarrassing specifics: transfer amounts, body awkwardness, neighborhood petty detail, ugly motives, and the unstable overlap between care and control. When a choice arises between a safer generalized line and a sharper socially revealing one, choose the sharper line unless it breaks character truth.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches sex, money shame, betrayal, or bodily disgust and the prose flinches into summary or tasteful fog, revise toward concrete action, sensory residue, and social consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are normal in almost all spoken English here; full forms are reserved for emphasis, class performance, or moments of deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressed one-scene chapters with socially dense multi-scene chapters; follow hot chapters with quiet domestic ones, let comic humiliation sit beside grief, and vary dialogue density so no two consecutive chapters share the same pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsanitized, class-attentive English with enough lyric lift to surprise but not enough polish to float above the bodies and bills in the room.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third person centered on Lena, with no head-hopping; June and Eli are knowable only through what Lena hears, sees, infers, and later uncovers in artifacts.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive sentences that can hold embarrassment and desire in the same line, then snap short at moments of exposure or financial pain.
